Notifications
Savour will never spam you — just gentle nudges to keep your list alive.

Weekly nudge
A gentle Sunday reminder to add or revisit your list.
Savour · Sunday
"What's one thing you'd love to experience this week?"

Milestone alerts
Celebrates when you hit 25%, 50%, 75%, or 100%.

"You're halfway through your list. You're really living it."
🎞
Memory anniversaries
One year after completing an experience, Savour surfaces it.
Savour · One year ago
"You went wine tasting in Napa. How does that feel now?"
